mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM sys_menu WHERE deleted = 0
AND menu_name LIKE '%' || #{menuName} || '%'
AND menu_code LIKE '%' || #{menuCode} || '%'
AND status = #{status}
ORDER BY sort_order ASC
SELECT * FROM sys_menu WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort_order ASC
SELECT * FROM sys_menu WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_menu (parent_id, menu_name, menu_code, path, component, icon, sort_order, menu_type, visible, status) VALUES (#{parentId}, #{menuName}, #{menuCode}, #{path}, #{component}, #{icon}, #{sortOrder}, #{menuType}, #{visible}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_menu SET parent_id = #{parentId}, menu_name = #{menuName}, menu_code = #{menuCode}, path = #{path}, component = #{component}, icon = #{icon}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, menu_type = #{menuType}, visible = #{visible}, status = #{status}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE sys_menu SET deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT m.* FROM sys_menu m LEFT JOIN sys_role_menu rm ON m.id = rm.menu_id LEFT JOIN sys_user_role ur ON rm.role_id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND m.deleted = 0 AND m.status = 1 ORDER BY m.sort_order ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_menu WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_role_menu WHERE menu_id = #{menuId}
